requirementRef: Requirement: R-1 Single entry point with state-driven evaluation
description: deriveObservedCondition returns null when nothing requires compaction
notes: Quiet state: tokens low, no provider/account drift, no manual request, no overflow

requirementRef: Requirement: R-1 Single entry point with state-driven evaluation
description: Manual request takes priority over other observed conditions
notes: Even with overflow, manual takes priority because user intent is highest signal

requirementRef: Requirement: R-1 Single entry point with state-driven evaluation
description: Previous-iteration flag must NOT be consulted (DD-1)
notes: Even with the legacy flag injected, deriveObservedCondition must not return non-null. State is the only source of truth.

description: Free narrative path succeeds, no API call made
Narrative empty, fall through to schema with log line
Rebind refuses paid kinds even when free chain exhausted
notes: rebind chain is [narrative, schema, replay-tail] only; never escalates to paid

requirementRef: Requirement: R-3 Memory backed by TurnSummary, captured at runloop exit

parts.text: Done. Summary: edited foo.ts and ran tests; all green.

appendedTurnSummary.text: Done. Summary: edited foo.ts and ran tests; all green.

notes: DD-2 capture timing: only at runloop exit

requirementRef: Requirement: R-3 Memory backed by TurnSummary, captured at runloop exit
description: Mid-run interruption does NOT append partial summary
notes: finish=tool-calls means autonomous mode mid-run; no capture per DD-2

requirementRef: Requirement: R-4 Manual /compact uses same entry, narrative-preferred
description: Default manual /compact prefers narrative, skips schema
notes: Schema kind is NOT in manual chain because schema doesn't preserve reasoning

requirementRef: Requirement: R-4 Manual /compact uses same entry, narrative-preferred
description: /compact --rich skips kinds 1-3 and goes to LLM agent
notes: DD-10: --rich forces full LLM round regardless of cost

requirementRef: Requirement: R-5 Provider switch uses narrative only
description: Provider switch with non-empty memory writes narrative anchor
notes: replay-tail rejected: raw tail has codex-specific tool format unreadable by claude. low-cost-server rejected: codex /compact returns codex format. llm-agent acceptable in principle but provider-switched chain stops at schema.

requirementRef: Requirement: R-6 Rebind never injects synthetic Continue
description: Rebind run with successful narrative does NOT append Continue
notes: INJECT_CONTINUE['rebind']=false. The 2026-04-27 infinite-loop bug is structurally unrepresentable here.

requirementRef: Requirement: R-6 Rebind never injects synthetic Continue
description: Overflow run DOES append synthetic Continue

expected.continueText: Continue if you have next steps, or stop and ask for clarification if you are unsure how to proceed.

requirementRef: Requirement: R-7 Memory persistence is single-write, fallback-read
description: Read of session with no new-path data falls back to legacy
notes: First read of legacy session triggers projected write to new path

description: renderForLLM and renderForHuman produce different strings
notes: DD-5: independent render functions; human form has timeline annotations LLM form doesn't

requirementRef: Requirement: R-9 Deprecation shim window: 1 release
description: Legacy SharedContext.snapshot call emits warn and delegates
notes: Every legacy API in the shim layer must surface in CI logs
